metadata.description: The Lens — Manual Focus's working library of AI marketing skills for endurance-sport brands. Companion to the playbooks at manual-focus.co.uk/lens.

plugins.name: the-lens
plugins.description: 14 AI marketing skills covering positioning, brand voice, naming, demand-gen, content systems, lifecycle, and the endurance-specific workflows (race-day demand pipelines, race-result content, segment b-roll, endurance brand voice) plus the AI studio news watch.
